description.value:
Death World

Natives of death worlds grow up where every day is a struggle against predators, disasters, and hostile terrain. Life in such places teaches vigilance, speed, and the habit of reacting before hesitation becomes a corpse. Those who survive long enough to serve an Inquisitor are grim pragmatists hardened by environments that should never have sustained human life at all.

Homeworld Bonus

+Agility, +Perception, -Fellowship

Homeworld Aptitude

Fieldcraft

Wounds

9+1d5

Fate Threshold

2 (Emperor's Blessing 5+)

Homeworld Trait

Survivor's Paranoia: While a death world character is Surprised, non-Surprised attackers do not gain the normal +30 bonus to their Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests when targeting this character.

specialAbilities.name: Survivor's Paranoia
specialAbilities.description: While a Death World character is Surprised, enemies do not gain the usual +20 bonus to Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill tests when attacking them.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 5+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
